assignments.name: CONFIG_NOTES
assignments.value: Source-first workflow. Daily direct HTTP checks use Airtable Sources and cost no search credits. Discovery uses Brave first, then optional SerpAPI, then optional Tavily. Recommended: DISCOVERY_MODE weekly, DISCOVERY_QUERY_LIMIT 1-3, SOURCE_RECHECK_LIMIT 5-20, OPEN_CALL_MAX_CANDIDATES 3-20.
